title: Sub-decree no.02 On transfer of state property
description: This sub-decree shows the transfer of one plot of land measuring 693 square meters, located in Village 3, Sangkat Prey Veng, Prey Veng City, with Certificate of Immovable Property No. 1411030201 dated August 1, 2018, from the inventory of state property of the Prey Veng Provincial Department of Health, to the Prey Veng Provincial Administration for management and recording of the inventory of state property.
